definitions.text: A plant, grown for it, or its fruits or seeds, to be harvested as food, livestock fodder, or fuel or for any other economic purpose.
examples: The farmer had to decide which crop to grow as his main bet for the coming year. Would it be barley, oats, or something else?

definitions.text: To remove the top end of something, especially a plant.
To cut (especially hair or an animal's tail or ears) short.
